task: Supabase admin login and history storage gate audit
head: f02be0ea68ebf18b5f9cccadac9dc465dce72a0f

findings.details: The app runtime does not use SAFEGUARD_AUTH_TOKEN. /archive and workspace storage read the browser Supabase session and send Authorization: Bearer <session.access_token> to protected storage routes.
GET and POST return 401 when Supabase is configured but no user access token is provided. POST stores through service role only after getWorkspaceUser validates the user token.
GET and POST return 401 when Supabase is configured but no user access token is provided. Dispatch log persistence requires both authToken and a saved workpackId in the UI.

Workspace save previously posted question/scenario/deliverables/status but not the full AskResponse data. That could save history while making later workpack reopen fail because evidence_summary.externalData and riskSummary were incomplete. The UI now sends data: workspaceData.

findings.classification: code fix required plus environment value required
findings.details: The smoke still needs SAFEGUARD_AUTH_TOKEN because it has no browser session. The saved workpack payload now also includes data: askPayload so token-backed smoke writes reopen-capable workpacks.

build.blocker: Next build compiles successfully, then fails during page-data collection for /api/workers/route and /api/search/route. This is outside the Supabase auth/storage gate patch.

localRouteSmoke.notice: Next dev intermittently returned 404 HTML while webpack cache writes failed under .next, but repeated API attempts confirmed the intended auth gate responses.
